title: lagoseris tenuifolia
intro: Lagoseris tenuifolia, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a perennial plant native to China, used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties. This plant contains coumarins, ferulic acid, and ligustilide, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lagoseris tenuifolia include relieving menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Lagoseris tenuifolia include teas, capsules, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
